session_metadata.user_query: Technology companies earnings reports this quarter

performance_metrics.completion_reason: Investigation failed: 'InvestigationEngine' object has no attribute 'logger'

low_effectiveness.query: "tech earnings reports" OR "technology Q2 earnings" OR "technology Q3 earnings" 2024

most_effective_strategies.strategy: Graph Strategy: To build a comprehensive understanding of technology companies' earnings reports this quarter, the initial strategy involves a multi-pronged approach. First, a broad search will identify general discussions, key companies, and significant dates. Concurrently, examining the timelines of established financial news sources will provide expert commentary and official announcements. Finally, checking current trends will help identify emergent, high-impact topics or specific companies gaining public attention regarding their financial performance. This combination ensures both breadth and depth in information gathering, addressing the 'continue building comprehensive understanding' gap.
